title: 39.25'' X 29'' Round Glass Cocktail Table with Chrome Base
features: Our 39.25'' round cocktail table provides the perfect amount of space for your guests to rest multiple drinks or plates of food while they mingle and enjoy your venue.
With the 29'' counter height provided from this table, it can also be used to display flowers or other event decorations.
These tables are a great addition for commercial or residential use.
Features include an easy clean clear glass top and plastic ring to protect floors.
